businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader, built on three pillars: Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI-powered data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue topped $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). The Pentagon officially adopted Maven AI as a program of record, expanding it across all military branches. Selected as software developer for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - short-term adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 6.7x the S&P 500 IT sector average of 34x. Extreme premium, though gradually compressing as the stock pulls back

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS est. of $1.32. Down from 112x yesterday. Still 3x the growth stock average of 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026E $7.40B. Growth accelerating on AI defense demand

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5-7x the software sector average of 10-15x. Still in overvaluation territory relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down -31% from 52-week high of $207. Three consecutive days of decline, fully erasing the Golden Dome rally

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Room before oversold (below 30) but bounce momentum is weak in the current downtrend

growthDrivers.title: Trefis: Analysis of 50%+ Rally Triggers (3/27)
growthDrivers.description: Trefis analyzed past PLTR 50%+ rally patterns, finding current catalysts (Golden Dome, Maven, commercial growth) align with historical surge triggers

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B Missile Defense Software Selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir and Anduril selected to co-develop software for Trump admin's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system. Major long-term defense revenue pipeline

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank Buys PLTR Shares (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech National Bank purchased 24,730 shares. A central bank buying an AI defense stock is a strong institutional confidence signal

growthDrivers.title: Bain & Company Global Partnership Expansion (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Expanded partnership with Bain to accelerate global AIP and Foundry adoption through consulting channels

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Official Program of Record (3/23)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as an official program of record, deploying it across all military branches long-term

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in accelerating growth. US commercial segment (+137% YoY) is the primary growth engine

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record with top-tier security clearances, Maven officially adopted by the US military, and battlefield-tested in the Iran conflict. A moat that money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Once deployed, replacement cost is extremely high
Top-tier security clearances and 20+ years of government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to achieve the same level
Rapid customer acquisition through AIP Bootcamps and expanding Ontology data model ecosystem
Used in real-time for thousands of strikes in the Iran conflict. Real combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Partnership with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Significantly behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale is large but lack Palantir's deep Ontology platform integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Trails Palantir significantly in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.significance: Accelerating global AIP/Foundry adoption through top consulting firm's client network

recentNews.significance: One of the most bullish Wall Street calls. Implies +40% upside from current levels

recentNews.headline: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection
recentNews.significance: Selected with Anduril for Trump admin's $185B space-based missile defense system software

analystOpinions.notableComment: MarketBeat consensus $198.59 (+39%). Rosenblatt $200 Buy maintained. 24/7 Wall St $171.26 (+20%). Despite valuation debate, majority of analysts see upside

risks.title: Extreme valuation premium
risks.description: P/E 227x (6.7x the S&P 500 IT avg of 34x), P/S 76x (5-7x software avg). Forward PE 108x is 3x growth stock averages. Expectations already heavily priced in

risks.title: Below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs
risks.description: Trading below 50-day ($148.62) and 200-day ($168.58) moving averages. Three consecutive declines with downward momentum. $126 support level exposed

risks.title: Macro-driven tech selloff risk
risks.description: Down 5% on 3/24 and 3% on 3/27 from broad tech selling. Rate environment and geopolitical uncertainty weigh on high-valuation tech stocks

risks.title: Analyst opinion split
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Sustained market skepticism about valuation sustainability

risks.title: Stock-based compensation dilution
risks.description: Share count increased 4.67% YoY. Ongoing SBC creates shareholder value dilution concerns

buyReasons.title: Irreplaceable defense AI position + long-term pipeline
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B + Maven program of record + Iran battlefield validation. Czech central bank buying. Unmatched position in defense AI

buyReasons.title: Explosive commercial growth + partner expansion
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial revenue Q4 +137%. Bain & Company partnership accelerating global AIP adoption. FY2026 +65% guidance

buyReasons.title: -31% discount from 52-week high
buyReasons.rationale: Down -31% from $207 high while fundamentals strengthened with Golden Dome and Maven. Price vs fundamentals divergence

buyReasons.title: Trefis 50%+ rally catalyst analysis
buyReasons.rationale: Historical major rally patterns align with current catalysts (Golden Dome, Maven, commercial growth). Significant upside potential when sentiment shifts

overallOpinion: PLTR at $143.06 (-3%), third consecutive day of decline. Trading below both the 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169) SMAs. The Golden Dome rally has been fully erased by the broad tech selloff

Fundamentals are the strongest they have ever been. Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying, Bain partnership. Trefis notes current catalysts mirror past 50%+ rally triggers
Valuation remains the key headwind. P/E 227x (6.7x IT sector avg of 34x), P/S 76x. Analysts split 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Macro weakness continues to pressure high-multiple tech

Consensus target $199 (+39%). Near-term downside to $126 support is open, but long-term growth trajectory is clear. Hold with small position building only. Wait for valuation normalization before aggressive buying

investmentVerdict.summary: Fundamentals are at all-time strength with Golden Dome, Maven, and +137% commercial growth, but P/E 227x with both 50/200-day SMAs broken and three straight days of decline. Growth direction is certain but near-term selling pressure is real. Small position building is fine, but wait for valuation to compress before aggressive buying

Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying, Bain partnership, FY2026 +65%. Shouldn't this be going up?

Market: 'P/E is 227x though.' That's the whole argument.

Consensus $199 (+39%). Down -31% from highs. Hold, small bites only.

empathy.hook: PLTR shareholders, three straight days of red is tough. But fundamentals keep strengthening
empathy.text:
$PLTR $143.06 (-3%), down -31% from highs.

Three straight declines is really tough. The Golden Dome excitement from Monday feels like a lifetime ago.

But the company keeps getting stronger. Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying, Bain partnership. Trefis says 50%+ rally catalysts are building, matching past rebound patterns.

The market is pressing down all tech right now. Consensus $199 (+39%).

Small positions, steady pace. Long-term is the play.
